mapper.insert: insert into batch.workflow_definition ( tenant_id, workflow_code, workflow_name, workflow_type, version, enabled, description ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{workflowCode}, #{workflowName}, #{workflowType}'DAG', #{version}1, #{enabled}true, #{description} )
mapper.update: update batch.workflow_definition set workflow_name = #{workflowName}, workflow_type = #{workflowType}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into batch.workflow_definition ( tenant_id, workflow_code, workflow_name, workflow_type, version, enabled, description, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{workflowCode}, #{workflowName}, #{workflowType}'DAG', #{version}1, #{enabled}true, #{description}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} ) on conflict (tenant_id, workflow_code, version) do update set workflow_name = excluded.workflow_name, workflow_type = excluded.workflow_type, enabled = excluded.enabled, description = excluded.description, updated_by = excluded.updated_by, updated_at = current_timestamp
